case_title: PRICE, JONA-MARIE vs. VOLK, FRANCIS S.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLK, FRANCIS S. $12,791.75 PRINCIPAL, $1,491.28 INTEREST, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,391.03 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
